title: Cadence Digital and Custom/Analog Design Flows Certified for Samsung Foundry's SF2 and SF3 Process Technologies
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cadence announced that its digital and custom/analog flows achieved certification for Samsung Foundry's SF2 and SF3 process technologies.

title: Cadence (CDNS) Upgraded to Buy: What Does It Mean for the Stock?
text: Cadence (CDNS) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

title: Is Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) Stock Outpacing Its Computer and Technology Peers This Year?
text: Here is how Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) and MicroStrategy (MSTR) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.

title: Cadence's (CDNS) Simulation Solutions Used by DB GlobalChip
text: Cadence (CDNS) solutions are being leveraged by DB GlobalChip to meet the demanding design requirements for analog and mixed-signal IPs.

title: Nvidia has talked up AI the most lately, but other highly chatty players may surprise you
text: It's perhaps unsurprising which S&P 500 component was the most vocal about artificial intelligence this earnings season.

title: Cadence Design Systems: Valuation Is Too High
text: Cadence Design Systems is a high-quality business that demonstrated a solid ability to capture favorable secular trends. The company experiences short term headwinds related to the weakness from end markets. Moreover, my valuation analysis suggests the stock is significantly overvalued.

title: Cadence (CDNS) & Samsung Foundry Expand Design IP Partnership
text: Cadence (CDNS) collaborates with Samsung Foundry to help mutual customers with access to a wide-ranging design IP portfolio on SF5A technology.

title: Cadence and Samsung Foundry Enter Multi-Year Agreement to Expand Design IP Portfolio
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $CDNS--Cadence and Samsung Foundry have signed a multi-year agreement to expand the availability of Cadence's design IP portfolio.

title: Cadence Design stock climbs into record territory after $200 million accelerated buyback agreement
text: Shares of Cadence Design Systems Inc. CDNS, +1.71% climbed 2.3% into record territory in premarket trading Tueday, after the electronic systems design company announced a $200 million accelerated share repurchase (ASR) agreement. The ASR represents 0.3% of the company's market capitalization of $63.6 billion as of Monday's close.

title: Cadence Announces $200 Million Accelerated Share Repurchase Agreement
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $CDNS--Cadence entered into an ASR agreement with HSBC Bank USA, National Association to repurchase an aggregate of $200 million of Cadence common stock.

title: Cadence (CDNS) Gains 45% YTD: Will the Uptrend Continue?
text: Cadence's (CDNS) performance is gaining from robust customer demand amid increasing design activity.

title: Wall Street Analysts See Cadence (CDNS) as a Buy: Should You Invest?
text: The recommendations of Wall Street analysts are often relied on by investors when deciding whether to buy, sell, or hold a stock. Media reports about these brokerage-firm-employed (or sell-side) analysts changing their ratings often affect a stock's price.
